verses.text: Ahih hangin a ki-ap nate tawh kisai-in Israel mite zuautat uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Judah minam Zerah tapa Zabdi, a tapa Karmi, a tapa Akhan in a ki-ap nate pawlkhat la ahih manin Israel mite tungah Topa heh mahmah hi
Joshua in Jerikho panin Bethel nisuahna lam Bethaven gei-a om Ai khua-ah mi sawlin amaute kiangah, “Paito un la a gam va en un,” a ci hi. Tua mite paito-in Ai khua va ensim uh hi

Amaute Joshua kiangah hong ciahkikin ama kiangah, “Mi khempeuh kuanto sak kei in la, mi tul nih ahi a, tul thum ahi zongin kuanto sakin Ai khua simsak in. Amaute mi tawmno khat ahih manin tua lai-ah mi khempeuh gimto sak kei in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite lak panin tul thum bang tua lai-ah a kuanto uh hi. Ai mite' mai-ah amaute tai uh a
Ai mite in amau' kulhkongpi mai panin Shebarim ciangdong delh uh a, tuahsukna munah amaute sawmthum leh guk khawng a that uh hi. Hih thu hangin Israel mite' han'na bei-in, lau mahmah uh hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in dahna limin ama puante balkekin nitak mateng Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah, amah leh Israel upate boksuk uh a, amaute in a lu tung uhah leivui a koih uh hi

Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Ala, Topa Pasian, kote a hong susia ding Amor mite' khutsungah a hong pia dingin bang hangin hih mite Jordan galkhatah hong paipih peuhmah na hi hiam? Jordan galkhatah ten' ding a lungkim hi hoh ta le-ung
Topa aw, Israel-te a galte uh mai-ah a nungkik uh ciangin bang gen thei ding ka hi hiam

Bang hang hiam cih leh Kanaan mite leh hih gama teng mi khempeuh in hih thu za ding uh a, kote hong umcihin leitung panin kote hong phiatkhia mang ding uh hi. Tua ciangin a lian mahmah nangma min bang cih ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Topa in Joshua kiangah, “Tho in, bang hangin tua bangin lei-ah bok na hi hiam
Israel mite khial a, amaute in ka thupiak thuciamna palsat khin uh hi. Amaute in a ki-ap nate pawlkhat la uh a, amaute in gu-in zuauthu gen uh a, amau' van lakah tua nate koih uh hi

Tua thu hangin Israel mite in a galte uh nang zolo uh hi. Amaute pen suksiat ding mi na suak khin uh ahih manin a galte uh mai-ah nungkik uh hi. Note' lak panin a ki-ap nate na suksiat kei uh leh note tawh kong omkhawm nawn kei ding hi

Tho in, mite sian'suah in la, ‘Zing cianga dingin note kisian'suah tawm un. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel Pasian Topa in, “Israel mite aw, note' lakah a ki-ap nate om hi. Note' lak panin a ki-ap nate na lakkhiat matengun na galte uh na nangzo kei ding uh hi,” ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin na minam namun note hong kipaipih ding hi. Topa in a lak minam sung panin a behbehin hong pai ding hi. Topa in a lak a beh sung panin a innkuankuanin hong pai ding hi. Topa in a lak a innkuan sung panin a mimi-in hong pai ding hi

Tua ciangin a ki-ap nate tawh a kila khawm mipa leh a neih khempeuh, mei-in kihal ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Topa' thuciamna palsat hi. Israel sungah a zumhuai-in a gamta ahi hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Joshua tho baihin, a namnamin Israel-te hong paipih a, Judah minam kila hi
Tua ciangin amah in Judah behte hong paipih a, Zerah-te beh kila hi. Amah in Zerah-te beh a mimi-in hong paipih a, Zabdi kila hi
Tua ciangin amah in ama innkuanpihte a mimi-in hong paipih a, Judah minam Zerah' tapa Zabdi, a tapa Karmi, a tapa Akhan kila hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in Akhan kiangah, “Ka tapa aw, Israel Topa Pasian minthangsak in la, amah phat in. Tu-in na gamtatnasate kei tungah hong gen in la, bangmah hong im kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Akhan in Joshua dawngin, “A taktakin, Israel Topa Pasian tungah ka khial khin a, hih bangin ka gamta kha hi

Shinar panin vankia lakah puanhoih khat, leh ngun shekel za nih a gik, leh shekel sawmnga a gik kham tawn khat ka muh ciangin, tuate iplahin ka lakha hi. Tu-in tuate ka puanbuk sung leilakah a ngunte a nuai-ah omin kiseel hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in sawltakte sawl a, amaute a puanbukah va tai uh a, a puanbuk sungah a ngun nuainungin na kiseel takpi hi
Amaute in puanbuk panin tuate lakhia-in Joshua leh Israel mite khempeuh kiangah hong paipih uh a, tua ciangin amaute in Topa' mai-ah a koih uh hi

Tua ciangin Joshua leh amah tawh a om Israel-te khempeuh in Zerah' tapa Akhan, leh a ngun, a puan, a kham tawn, a tanute, a tapate, a bawngtalte, a late, a tuute, a puanbuk, leh a neih khempeuh la uh a, amaute in Akhor Kuam ciangah tuate a paipih uh hi

Tua ciangin Joshua in, “Bang hangin kote tungah gimna hong tun' na hi hiam? Tuni-in Topa in nang tungah gimna hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Israel-te khempeuh in suang tawh Akhan a denglum uh hi. Amaute in a innkuanpih dangte leh a neihsate uh zong suang tawh denglumin a hal uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in tuni donga a om suang honpi ama tungah a ciang uh hi. Tua ciangin Topa' hehluatna a dai hi. Tua ahih ciangin tudongin tua mun pen Akhor Kuam, kici hi.
